observations: Empty ChromaDB collections: healing_knowledge, experiential_journal, episteme_research, enterprise_knowledge, critic, unresolved_tensions, aesthetic_patterns, scope_reflections, introspector, reflections_researcher, reflections_critic, reflections_coder, writer, reflections_writer, scope_project_renewable_energy
narrative: I noticed a medium-severity Neo4j authorization failure preventing persistent knowledge graph updates in Mem0 memory. My inspection revealed five agents (desktop, devops, financial_analyst, pim, reasoning_methods) lack versioned prompts, creating unstable execution contexts. This gaps in prompt versioning directly conflict with my self-improvement protocol that requires documented agent specifications. These findings indicate a critical vulnerability in my memory integrity and operational consistency.
